models.tasks: Each task represents a unit of work that a team member creates, tracks, and completes. Tasks have a global rank that determines their order across all views.
models.columns: Columns are the status groupings used in the Kanban board. Each column represents a stage in the workflow that tasks move through.
models.labels: Labels are tags applied to tasks for categorization. They help teams organize and filter tasks by topic or type.
models.users: Users are the team members who can be assigned to tasks and collaborate on the project.

relationships: Each Task belongs to a Column (its current status) via the columnId field
Each Task can have one or more Labels referenced by labelIds
Each Task is assigned to a User via the assigneeId field
Columns define the workflow stages that tasks move through on the Kanban board

tasks.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
tasks.description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment. Should run unit tests on every PR and deploy to staging on merge to main.

tasks.title: Design onboarding flow
tasks.description: Create wireframes and high-fidelity mockups for the new user onboarding experience. Include empty states and first-task creation.

tasks.title: Implement auth endpoints
tasks.description: Build login, signup, and token refresh endpoints. Use JWT with refresh token rotation. Need to integrate with the existing user model and add rate limiting to prevent brute force attempts.

tasks.title: Build task list component
tasks.description: Create the list view component with sortable rows. Each row should display title, label, priority, assignee, and due date.

tasks.title: Fix drag-and-drop flicker on fast moves
tasks.description: When dragging cards quickly between columns, there's a brief visual flicker where the card appears in both the source and target column for one frame.

tasks.title: Project scaffolding
tasks.description: Initialize the monorepo structure with SvelteKit, configure Tailwind CSS v4, and set up the component library with shadcn-svelte.

tasks.title: Database schema design
tasks.description: Define the initial Postgres schema for tasks, columns, labels, and users. Include migration files and seed script.
